title: Birthday
overview: Chika, Miu and Matsuri notice that it's Nobue's birthday and plan to make her a gift by themselves.

title: Ana
overview: After moving to Japan from England, Ana starts at the same class as Matsuri and pretends to know nothing about Japan or Japanese.

title: House Call
overview: Ana invites Matsuri at her place to help her study English. But much to her grief, the entire gang decides to tag along.

title: Part-time Job
overview: Nobue finds out she's ran out of money to buy cigarettes and tries to find a fitting part-time job. Ana, Matsuri, Chika and Miu do their best and worst to help her.

title: Sleepover
overview: Miu becomes jealous over the attention Ana and Matsuri gain from Nobue.

title: Hot Summer Day
overview: Intense summer heat causes the girls' imagination to run wild again.

title: Beach Trip
overview: Miu is shooting a video documentary for school, and chooses the Itō household as her subject. In the end, Nobue takes the gang out for a beach trip.

title: Festival
overview: A festival episode has the gang dress up in yukatas and head out to see fireworks.

title: Growing Child
overview: Chika discovers she's gained a bit of weight, and, provoked by Miu, starts her own diet. It's only after a pointful remark by Nobue, that Chika's self-confidence gets restored.

title: Flower
overview: Many sidequests disturb the girls' trip to a distant restaurant to have cake with Nobue.

title: First Snow
overview: After a freezing cold autumn day, the gang pays a visit to hot baths and witnesses the first snow fall.

title: Present
overview: Matsuri's faith in Santa Claus makes the rest of the gang guarantee her a happy Christmas.
